Office Assistant & Bookkeeper at a general retail store • Track and record deposited checks and sales transaction revenue through the POS system and the business's financial banking account. • Provide monthly billing invoices for client expenses. • Cash personal and business checks, and send and receive money for customers via wire transfer services. • Calculate and document payroll taxes, wages, and register reports using accounting software. • Receive and answer calls from customers needing assistance with various business-related matters and issues.
